# GreenRoot QR Code & UUID Design (V1)

## Purpose

GreenRoot uses **UUIDs** as the primary identifier.

**QR Codes are only a visual representation of the UUID** to eliminate manual typing.

The QR image is **never stored** in the database.

---

# Principles

* UUID is the source of truth.
* QR Code is generated dynamically from the UUID.
* Every QR has an expiry time.
* Every QR is single-purpose.
* QR cannot be reused after completion or expiry.
* All QR operations are audited.

---

# QR Scenario 1 — Driver Joins Trip

## Generated By

* Nursery Owner
* Nursery Manager

## Scanned By

* Driver

## Business Flow

Owner/Manager

↓

Generate Trip UUID

↓

Generate QR Code

↓

Driver scans QR

↓

Trip Preview

↓

Driver confirms

↓

Driver joins trip

↓

Trip becomes Active

---

## Alternative

If camera is unavailable,

Driver enters Trip UUID manually.

Example

```
TRP-3F7A2C9B-8D11-4F6A-9B2D-1E7C9F3A6B12
```

---

# QR Scenario 2 — Manager Joins Nursery

## Generated By

* Nursery Owner

## Scanned By

* Manager

## Business Flow

Owner

↓

Generate Nursery Invitation UUID

↓

Generate QR

↓

Manager scans

↓

Nursery Preview

↓

Manager confirms

↓

Manager linked to Nursery

---

## Alternative

Manager enters Invitation UUID manually.

---

# QR Scenario 3 — Customer Onboarding

## Generated By

* Nursery Owner
* Nursery Manager

## Scanned By

* Customer

## Business Flow

Owner/Manager

↓

Generate Customer Invitation UUID

↓

Generate QR

↓

Customer scans

↓

Nursery Preview

↓

Customer confirms

↓

Customer linked to Nursery

---

## Alternative

Customer enters Invitation UUID manually.

---

# Database Design

Store only UUID information.

Never store QR images.

Example

```
uuid
type
reference_id
generated_by
generated_at
expires_at
used_at
used_by
status
```

---

# QR Types

```
TRIP_JOIN

MANAGER_INVITE

CUSTOMER_INVITE
```

---

# QR Status

```
GENERATED

ACTIVE

USED

EXPIRED

CANCELLED
```

---

# Security

* UUID must be cryptographically random.
* UUID expires automatically.
* UUID is single-use.
* Expired UUID cannot be reused.
* Used UUID cannot be reused.
* Every scan is logged.
* Every successful join is audited.

---

# QR Image

Do NOT store

* PNG
* JPG
* SVG
* Base64

Generate dynamically whenever required.

---

# Mobile UX

Every QR flow follows the same pattern.

```
Open Scanner

↓

Scan QR

OR

Enter UUID

↓

Backend Validation

↓

Preview Screen

↓

Confirmation

↓

Success

↓

Next Workflow
```

---

# Benefits

* Less typing
* Faster onboarding
* Lower human error
* Simple implementation
* Secure
* Easy auditing
* Same UX pattern across all QR workflows

---

# V1 Scope

Only three QR workflows are supported.

1. Driver joins Trip
2. Manager joins Nursery
3. Customer joins Nursery

No other modules use QR codes in V1.
